sub_goals.description: Write controller.js — Controller.init(rootEl) on DOMContentLoaded. Maintains state, wires DOM events for deal/hit/stand/double/split/reset by stable IDs, calls RulesEngine + Bankroll, repaints via UIRender after each transition. Handles blackjack-on-deal short-circuit.
Write index.html — minimal HTML5 page, link styles.css, script tags in exact order: rules-engine.js, bankroll.js, ui-render.js, controller.js, plus inline DOMContentLoaded bootstrap.
